title: Project card
description: One project's status, as shown on the dashboard. One file per project, in data/<slug>.json. See docs/SCHEMA.md for the reasoning behind each field.

schema_version.description: Version of this contract the file was written against. Lets the schema change later without breaking forks pinned to an older shape.

slug.description: Stable identifier. Must match the filename (data/<slug>.json) and the entry in manifest.json.

name.description: Display name, as a stakeholder would say it out loud.

type.description: What kind of thing this is. Drives the label on the card, nothing else.

status.description: The writer's judgment call. Never computed from milestones — see docs/SCHEMA.md.

summary.description: One line telling a stakeholder what this project is. No jargon, no internal names.

last_updated.description: The day a human last reviewed this file, YYYY-MM-DD. The header's 'Data as of' is the latest of these across all projects.

objectives.description: What this project set out to do. Written once; they rarely change.

outcomes.description: What the project actually produced, each ideally backed by something a reader can open.

evidence.description: Public links only. If a reader cannot open it without logging in, it does not belong here.

url.description: Must be https. Local paths and private URLs are rejected by design.

milestones.description: The path, in order. Carries no dates — order is the only sequence signal. The page derives the progress bar from these.
